question: Will the Federal Reserve's Secured Overnight Financing Rate have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-04-27?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/SOFR once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-04-27 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-04-17) was 4.360. (The latest value released in Secured Overnight Financing Rate from the release Secured Overnight Financing Rate Data.)
background: The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: N/A.  Additional background of the series:  1. the units of the series: Percent.  2. the seasonal adjustments of the series:  Not Seasonally Adjusted  3. the update frequency: Daily
